name: me-decision-profile
description: Build a person's numeric Decision Profile via a forced-tradeoff interview + stress scenarios, then give value-aligned, evidence-cited advice. Commands: /me-add <name> <language> to build/update a profile, /me-ask <name> to ask a decision question under one, and /me for the interactive flow. Trilingual (en/de/es). Stores only computed integers + the name; never raw answers.
